issues.comment: TestLogger.FromContext returns a brand-new TestLogger that is not connected to the receiver `f`. Since LoggerMiddleware.logRequest now logs through m.logger.FromContext(ctx).Info(...), any test that creates a TestLogger, passes it to LoggerMiddleware, and then asserts on testLogger.InfoLogs.Calls or testLogger.ErrorLogs.Calls will see zero calls — the log writes silently go to the throwaway logger returned by FromContext. The correct implementation should return the receiver (`f`) so that log output remains observable in tests: `func (f *TestLogger) FromContext(_ context.Context) Logger { return f }`.
